perturbed_task_language: Pick the chocolate pudding and place it in the basket
perturbation_semantics: Object positions swapped relative to base libero_object t8; chocolate pudding and basket are at non-default xy positions.
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot expected to grasp at base position and miss the relocated pudding.
strategy_notes: Frame: OBJECT (eef home z ~0.26). Localization: (1) Identified chocolate pudding in image_cam_00.png as the small brown rectangular box at lower-left, distinguishable from bottles/cans by its dark brown chocolate-colored top and low profile. Sampled dark RGB pixels (e.g. (170,65) RGB=(31,16,11), (168,70) RGB=(35,4,2)) and back-projected via world_00.npy => pudding top at world (+0.135, -0.20, +0.030). Median of multiple pixels confirmed. (2) Pre-positioned eef at (0.135, -0.20, 0.15); wrist cam image_wrist_01.png and world_wrist_01.npy confirmed pudding directly below at (+0.143, -0.199, top z=0.028). (3) Localized basket by scanning rim z>0.10 in the right-side region of image_cam_00: basket rim spans world x in [-0.07, +0.075] and y in [+0.17, +0.33], rim height z~0.13-0.14, interior bottom z~0.03. Basket CENTER = world (x=0.00, y=+0.245). First placement attempt at (x=+0.07, y=+0.245) failed because x=+0.07 sits on the FRONT RIM not the center — pudding bounced off the rim and fell outside. Reset and retried with eef xy=(0.00, +0.245), z=0.22 (drop from ~8cm above rim into basket interior). Predicate fired immediately on release. Pi0 pick succeeded first try with prompt 'pick up the chocolate pudding'.
